quality.rationale: 基于局部惯性系对角形式利用张量协变性构造运动参考系表达式；逻辑链条完整；为相对论流体力学核心建模步骤；具备广泛天体物理应用背景。

origin.question: Problem 5.3. In the rest frame of a perfect fluid its stress energy tensor, in terms of mass-energy density $\rho$ and pressure $\mathfrak{p}$ , is the diagonal tensor$$\mathbf {T}^{\mu \nu} = \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c} \rho & & & 0 \\\\ & \text {p} & & \\\\ & & \text {p} & \\\\ 0 & & & \text {p} \end{array}\right].$$If a fluid element of proper density and pressure, $\rho$ and $\mathfrak{p}$ is moving with 4-velocity $\mathbf{u}$ , what is its stress-energy?
origin.solution:
Solution 5.3. In the rest frame of the fluid element $\mathbf{u}^0 = \mathbf{1}$ , $\mathbf{u}^{\dot{\mathbf{i}}} = 0$ so that$$\mathbf {T}^{\mu 
u} = \mathrm {p g}^{\mu 
u} + (ho + \mathrm {p}) \mathrm {u}^{\mu} \mathrm {u}^{
u}.$$Since this is a tensor equation which is true in the rest frame of the fluid element, it must be true in general.
